code: import React,{useState,useContext}from"react";import axios from"axios";import"./BuyActionWindow.css";import GeneralContext from"./GeneralContext";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||"http://localhost:3002";const BuyActionWindow=_ref=>{let{uid}=_ref;const generalContext=useContext(GeneralContext);const[stockQuantity,setStockQuantity]=useState(1);const[stockPrice,setStockPrice]=useState(0.0);const handleBuyClick=async()=>{try{await axios.post("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/newOrder"),{name:uid,qty:stockQuantity,price:stockPrice,mode:"BUY"});}catch(error){console.error("Failed to submit order:",error);}finally{generalContext.closeBuyWindow();}};const handleCancelClick=()=>{generalContext.closeBuyWindow();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",id:"buy-window",draggable:"true",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"regular-order",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"inputs",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("fieldset",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("legend",{children:"Qty."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",name:"qty",id:"qty",onChange:e=>setStockQuantity(e.target.value),value:stockQuantity})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("fieldset",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("legend",{children:"Price"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",name:"price",id:"price",step:"0.05",onChange:e=>setStockPrice(e.target.value),value:stockPrice})]})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"buttons",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Margin required \u20B9140.65"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"btn btn-blue",onClick:handleBuyClick,children:"Buy"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"btn btn-grey",onClick:handleCancelClick,children:"Cancel"})]})]})]});};export default BuyActionWindow;
